name: HER2
pocket_summary: HER2 ATP hinge pocket represented by PDB 3PP0 ligand 03Q A 1.
summary: HER2 (ERBB2, HER2/neu) is a oncology target in the kinase class. The built-in expansion profile focuses on HER2-selective ATP-site inhibition and ERBB2-altered tumor coverage. Representative ligands include lapatinib, neratinib, tucatinib. Design reviews should track EGFR-family selectivity, diarrhea/rash liability, and CYP3A4 interaction pressure.

drugs.mechanism: Dual EGFR/HER2 reversible tyrosine kinase inhibitor

grid_box.method: RCSB ligand heavy-atom bounding box with 8 A padding

sar_rules.title: Preserve the primary kinase pharmacophore
sar_rules.rationale: HER2 optimization is driven by HER2-selective ATP-site inhibition and ERBB2-altered tumor coverage.
sar_rules.preferred_change: Modify solvent-exposed or peripheral vectors before replacing the core recognition motif.
sar_rules.avoid: Changing the main binding motif without a replacement interaction hypothesis.

sar_rules.title: Annotate selectivity and resistance hypotheses
sar_rules.rationale: Design decisions for HER2 should be interpreted against target-family selectivity and known clinical liabilities.
sar_rules.preferred_change: Record the intended selectivity vector and resistance coverage for each core change.
sar_rules.avoid: Ranking candidates only by a single docking or similarity score.

sar_rules.title: Balance hinge/allosteric potency with kinase panel risk
sar_rules.rationale: Kinase ATP pockets are conserved and off-target kinase activity can dominate safety margins.
sar_rules.preferred_change: Tune back-pocket and solvent-channel substituents while tracking family selectivity.
sar_rules.avoid: Adding aromatic bulk that increases promiscuity without selectivity evidence.

admet_risks.signal: EGFR-family selectivity, diarrhea/rash liability, and CYP3A4 interaction pressure
admet_risks.mitigation: Carry the target-specific safety note into candidate ranking and self-refutation.

admet_risks.signal: Representative active drugs can be large, aromatic, basic, peptide-like, or highly polar depending on target class.
admet_risks.mitigation: Track logP/TPSA/MW, ionization, CYP/P-gp flags, and route-of-administration assumptions together.

admet_risks.signal: Basic lipophilic motifs and high aromaticity can increase hERG/QT concern.
admet_risks.mitigation: Penalize high cLogP plus basic amine count and flag hERG predictions early.
